name: Easy Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix together 1/4 cup sugar and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon. Place a layer of apples in greased baking dish, sprinkle with half the sugar-cinnamon mixture, cover with remaining apples and cover with remaining sugar-cinnamon.
In a separate bowl, cream 1/2 cup sugar and 1 tablespoon butter. Add egg and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla and mix well. Stir in 1 cup flour and 1 teaspoon baking powder and spoon over apples, spreading as evenly as possible.
Bake for 30 minutes
Best served warm, with vanilla ice cream.
